__fixture__.name: layout_only_import_missing_extension_and_remote
__fixture__.scenario: A portable-state import restored the pane tree, but a preview extension and a remote notebook target were unavailable. The layout stays visible through placeholders that keep their stable pane ids, live authority and delegated approvals stay excluded, and the same provenance card is available in diagnostics, support export, and crash recovery.
doc_sections: UI/UX Spec 6.10 Session restore and crash-loop handling
UI/UX Spec 6.14 Workspace serialization, portable-state packages, and restore provenance

missing_surface_placeholders.notes: Preview pane stayed in its tab slot and reopened as a placeholder.
Notebook output stayed as evidence; kernel authority was not reused.

notes: Layout only. Missing dependencies reopened as placeholders, and excluded live authority is named instead of being silently omitted.
